# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This project is a TypeScript Node.js API using Fastify, Prisma, and better-auth.

## Key Technologies
- Fastify with TypeScript and Zod validation
- Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL
- better-auth for authentication
- ESM modules with strict TypeScript

## Coding Preferences
- Use functional programming patterns where appropriate
- Prefer explicit types over `any`
- Use async/await over promises
- Follow the existing code style and patterns
- Keep functions small and focused

## Testing Approach
- Focus on API endpoint testing
- Test database operations with proper setup/teardown
- Mock external dependencies appropriately
